name: google-mcp-universal
description: Universal Google Ads campaign manager — 148 tools (92 core + 56 batch), 27 slash commands. Supports any Google Ads account with batch product setup, AI ad copy generation, keyword intelligence, Shopping/PMax optimization, location/device/time analysis, PageSpeed audits, and multi-country campaign management. Author: God_FatherAI — https://github.com/ai-godfather/google-mcp-universal
